summary: The bathroom is finished to a high luxury standard with large marble-effect floor tiles, dark marble feature walls, and sleek integrated cabinetry. Overall decorative condition is good with only minor superficial wall scratches, and cleanliness is high, save for minor limescale residues on wet fittings and light surface dust on horizontal surrounds.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth plastered ceiling, painted in flat white emulsion.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Combination of large-format horizontal gloss beige ceramic wall tiles, high-gloss dark grey marble-effect feature tiles, and white-painted plaster sections.
defects: Light surface scratches/scuffs eye level to the painted wall segment as shown in photo P012

items.name: Flooring
items.description: High-gloss dark grey porcelain tiles with prominent white marble veining.

items.name: Door and Frame
items.description: Solid flush white-painted wooden door, white timber frame, complete with a modern square-profile matte black handle and latch mechanism.
defects: Faint surface handling smudges to leading edge and surface of the matte black handle lever exterior

items.name: Bathtub
items.description: White rectangular acrylic built-in bathtub with a front apron clad in dark grey marble-effect matching floor tiles.

items.name: Bath Screen
items.description: Frameless safety glass bath screen with a hinged polished chrome wall mount and clear plastic lower floor-seal.
defects: Mild water spotting to glass panel
Discolouration and light limescale residue build-up to the plastic drip seal

items.name: Bath/Shower Mixer Controls
items.description: Wall-integrated dual control valves with circular chrome faceplates and cylindrical dials.
defects: Light water spotting and scale residue to the chrome collars and dial surfaces

items.name: Shower Head and Riser
items.description: Wall-mounted chrome riser rail, slide bracket, flexible metal hose, and circular multi-spray patterns shower head.
defects: Noticeable white scale residue build-up nested between the ridges of the flexible metal hose
Faint water spotting to the chrome shower head casing

items.name: Integrated Sink & Vanity Surround
items.description: Large wall-floating integrated white composite rectangular basin with deep basin profile and wide deck surround.
defects: Light dust specks and faint surface smudging to horizontal decks near basin and mirror join

items.name: Basin Mixer Tap
items.description: Wall-mounted dark gunmetal/black chrome curved spout with matching single-lever control handle.

items.name: Mirrored Cabinet
items.description: Double-door wall-hung storage cabinet with mirrored front doors, illuminated LED backlights, grey oak veneer interior finish, integrated illuminated round magnification mirror, and storage shelves.

items.name: Toilet
items.description: Wall-hung white ceramic toilet pan (Geberit) with matching heavy-duty soft-close white plastic seat and lid.

items.name: Towel Radiator
items.description: Wall-mounted high-gloss polished chrome ladder-style electric heated towel rail.

items.name: Ceiling Lights
items.description: Recessed circular white bezel LED ceiling downlights and an integrated continuous linear profile LED strip.

items.name: Extractor Fan
items.description: Ceiling-mounted white circular plastic air extraction grille.

items.name: Robe Hooks
items.description: Circular brushed metal towel/robe peg hooks wall-mounted near the entrance.

items.name: Toilet Roll Holder
items.description: Recessed square polished chrome-plated wall inset toilet tissue holder.

items.name: Checkerboard Bath Mat
items.description: Small rectangular woven bath mat with a prominent black and white checkerboard pattern.

items.name: Pedal Bin & Brush Set
items.description: Small cylindrical polished stainless steel waste pedal bin, together with a matching chrome toilet brush handle and floor canister.
defects: Light superficial smear marks and water outlines to the metal lid of the pedal bin

items.name: Digital Bathroom Scales
items.description: Glass platform digital weighing scales.
